case_title: UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. KING, JAMES W. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-28-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-28-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF BRETT PEDERSEN RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMES W. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, JAMES W. $3,376.32 PRINCIPAL, $720.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $257.15 INTEREST, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,368.47 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMES W.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-28-1995, CONTINUED TO OCT-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF PAYMENTS; IF PLTF. FILES A NEW STATUS CONFERENCE AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE 10/24/95 DATE MAY BE CONTINUED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
